stimulus_shape.target: CON (Relate x Structure) at L3 significance — the structural reveal

source: orthogonal collision of two random Wikipedia draws
difficulty: intermediate — half-passed under the live engine: the mass channel (bayes) missed the reveal entirely, and the existing raw-id bridge diagnostic FAILED on this material (a coref blind spot the hand-built stimulus never hit)
novelty: high — the short-name cross-domain reveal class (a standing entity named by a new surface form) was not in the archive
verdict: confirmed capability + interior fix shipped; regression-locked

stimulus_shape.target: the novelty reserve (protention) — signal-derived vs constant

source: two constructed novelty regimes (deterministic) — the canonical positively-autocorrelated (burst/drought) vs anti-correlated (spaced-newcomer) streams

seed_of_record.recipe: clustered bursts of 3 newcomers separated by recurrence droughts
recurring 4-core, one newcomer every 6th line (maximally spaced)

difficulty: intermediate — the constant reserve is a strong baseline; the win and the loss are both real and roughly symmetric (+/-0.2 bits), so only the SIGN-SPLIT is decisive, not the aggregate
novelty: high — isolates the reserve's blind spot (rate, not autocorrelation); the rest of the archive measures structure/connectivity, not the protention's amplitude
verdict: confirmed dissociation; interior fix shipped OPT-IN; NOT promoted (breaks parity + regresses anti-correlated); regression-locked

stimulus_shape.target: the omnimodal reading COUNT — signal-derived (eigengap void) vs universal constant

source: an intense modality-blind battery: character-trigram hashing of two-register recurrence streams across Latin/Cyrillic/Greek/Arabic/Hebrew/Han/Kana/Devanagari/Hangul + code-switching, plus canonical spectral-segmentation hard cases (near-degenerate multiplicity, pure noise, single reading, gradual drift, adjacent recurrence, collinear, high-K, heavy common-mode)

seed_of_record.rng: numpy default_rng, per-stream seeds 100.. and fixed hard-case seeds

difficulty: hard — no fixed count wins everywhere (mass wins high-K, null wins the abstain trio); the geography-derived count must beat BOTH on the mean while abstaining exactly, and it must do so across scripts a tokenizer never sees
novelty: high — the archive measured structure/connectivity (exp-0001) and protention amplitude (exp-0002); this is the first pressure on the READING COUNT itself, and the first cross-lingual/omnimodal battery
verdict: confirmed — geography-derived count (readingCount) > both fixed rules on mean boundary F1 (38% vs null 31% vs mass 20%), abstention exact on all 6 flat streams; Born assignment held universal; new PURE export, parity byte-identical; regression-locked

stimulus_shape.target: atmosphere (relEntropy departure) + paradigm (commutator incommensurability) as complementary boundary channels

source: the exp-0003 battery (11 scripts + 8 hard problems), re-read with two LOCAL change-point channels instead of global lens-switching
difficulty: hard — each channel alone (atmo 30%, para 11%) is WORSE than lens (38%); the win exists only in the abstention-GATED union (44%), and only because the channels are complementary (crack different boundaries) not redundant
novelty: high — first use of relEntropy (Track B) and commutator (Track D) for segmentation; first multi-channel fusion; isolates the two boundary classes lens-switching is blind to
verdict: confirmed — gated-union 44% > lens 38%; atmosphere cracks near-degenerate multiplicity (two_balls 33% vs lens 0%), paradigm cracks adjacent-recurrence A|A (40% vs lens 0%), abstention preserved on all flat streams; new PURE export voidPeaks, parity byte-identical; regression-locked

stimulus_shape.target: the observed operating at MULTIPLE holon levels — single-level read vs recursive holon read; and sign-aware Born assignment

source: 4 nested streams: coarse family sections each carrying finer sub-readings (recurrence), plus one genuine 3-level nest (family superset mid superset fine)
difficulty: hard — two failures stack: the squared Born rule is sign-blind (a balanced split centred onto one axis reads as ONE reading -> boundary invisible), and even signed a single global read collapses the finer levels; only recursion with local re-centering + per-level void recovers them
novelty: high — first multi-LEVEL stimulus and first recursive reader; exposes that hard_two_balls (exp-0003/0004) was a sign-blindness artefact, not degeneracy
verdict: confirmed — mean all-levels F1 squared-single 36% -> signed-single 52% -> recursive-holon 65%; finer level 27% -> 51%; sign fix also lifts two_balls 0% -> 67%; new PURE export bornAssign (default squared byte-identical), parity preserved; regression-locked

stimulus_shape.target: the two-way holon coupling — dynamic pull (regulation) vs structural constitution (possibility) — and skeleton discovery from invariance
stimulus_shape.modality: synthetic articulated motion (a walking stick figure)

source: 3 walking stick figures (gaits 0.9/1.1/1.3 Hz), each with an off-gait WAVER limb (dynamically autonomous, rigidly attached) and a floating GHOST (no bond)
difficulty: hard — the two arrows collapse to one number for a pure shared mode; separating them needs a distinct STRUCTURAL reading, and the constitution measure must reject a ghost while accepting an autonomous waver
novelty: high — first DYNAMIC (motion) stimulus and first two-arrow coupling; the residual of the pull is shown to be the input to the next holon level (links coupling to exp-0005's recursion)
verdict: confirmed — mean limb pull 65% (whole dominates), skeleton recall 100% (13/13 bones from invariance), waver dissociation 3/3 (pull ~44% vs constit 100%), ghost rejected 3/3 (constit 62% < all limbs); new PURE export coupling, parity byte-identical; regression-locked

stimulus_shape.target: the GENERATE column of the operator cube on rho — INS (birth), SYN (merge), REC (learned prior)
stimulus_shape.modality: synthetic register/sequential readings + a transfer pair

source: a well-separated 6-reading sequence (INS regime) and two draws of the same 3 registers (REC transfer), short and long blocks
difficulty: hard — INS (online birth) loses the global spectrum readingCount sees; there is no fixed birth policy matching batch everywhere, and REC must beat both batch and cold online only in the short-block regime
novelty: high — first ONLINE reader, and the first test that maps the primitives onto the operator cube and completes the Generate column; shows why Generate was missing (time loses the global view)
verdict: confirmed — INS beats batch on separable readings (71% vs 45%, born=6=true), SYN gives clean identities, REC recognises with 0 births and beats batch+cold on short blocks (83% vs 67%); new PURE export recognize, parity byte-identical; regression-locked
